title: Polychilos fuscata
taxonomy: Polychilos fuscata is a species of orchid in the genus Polychilos, which is a part of the subtribe Polystachyinae. This subtribe is further classified under the tribe Coelogyneae and the family Orchidaceae. The Orchidaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. The Coelogyneae tribe is a subfamily of orchids that includes around 200 species. Polychilos fuscata's classification within this group reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history among the orchids.
